---
name: Security report
about: Report a security vulnerability (please use GitHub Security Advisories for sensitive issues)
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

**Vulnerability type**
<!-- e.g. RCE, privilege escalation, secret leak, supply-chain, dependency -->

**Affected component**
<!-- e.g. crates/focus-domain, .github/workflows/security-scan.yml -->

**Severity (CVSS estimate or qualitative)**
<!-- Critical / High / Medium / Low -->

**Description**
A clear description of the vulnerability and its impact.

**Reproduction**
Steps or proof-of-concept to reproduce.

**Suggested fix**
Optional: your proposed mitigation.

**Disclosure**
- Are you reporting publicly or requesting coordinated disclosure?
- Preferred contact channel

For sensitive issues, please use GitHub Security Advisories instead of a public issue:
https://github.com/KooshaPari/FocalPoint/security/advisories/new
